description: Immutable per-stage anomaly counts for a completed processing run.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fleet_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS stage_end_ts, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS source_rows, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS total_anomaly_lines, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pressure_surge_lines, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pump_rate_drop_lines, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS mid_stage_shutdown_lines, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS sweep_lines, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
